name: Outplay

auth.notes: client_id query parameter plus X-CLIENT-SECRET header; credentials are created under Outplay Integrations & API/API Settings.

rateLimits: Public Postman docs list response rate-limit headers, a burst limit of 100 calls per 10 seconds, and a daily limit of 100,000 calls per UTC day; individual APIs may vary.
pagination: Endpoint-specific list pagination in the Postman collection; verify per endpoint before bulk reads.
notes: Generated from the Tier 2/Tier 3 parallel specialist scout wave.
Use source links to refresh endpoint-level details before implementation.
The endpoint reference is a public Postman document; official Outplay help confirms where to create API client credentials.
